phase: P3 app-server wire parity (workflow-gate + unattended + host-URI) incl. sign-off blocker fixes

appServerFeatureTests.command: bun test app-server-workflow-gate + app-server-unattended + app-server-host-uris + agent-wire-host-uris

schemas.command: bun run generate-schemas && bun run check:schemas

adversarial.scenario: workflow-gate invalid answer / idempotency conflict / unknown-already-resolved
adversarial.expected: result-level rejected + structured JSON-RPC errors; audit events

adversarial.scenario: unattended denies method before side effects (hostTools/set, exec, host-URI read/write)
adversarial.expected: denied before backend call / registry mutation / request emission
cancels pending host-tool + host-URI requests, terminally rejects workflow gates, emits cancel notifs

adversarial.scenario: two threads register same host-URI scheme

adversarial.expected: request->result resolves pending waiter over real dispatch
